data.body: Hypothesis: git branch -D WORKTREE_BRANCH runs unconditionally at line 274, outside the _harvest_worktree_path guard block. In the self-removal scenario (where _harvest_worktree_path == _harvest_session_root), git rejects the deletion (current branch) but || true swallows the error. Fix: restructure cleanup block to guard branch deletion inside the self-removal guard. Regression guard (test 21) verifies no-worktree branch deletion still works after restructure. Approved for implementation.
